assignments.description: This Assignment is to make sure we add a dummy user to the list for it to loop so it breakes the loop with an unique username.
assignments.name: AddTmpUserForLoop
assignments.label: AddTmpUserForLoop

collectionProcessors.name: Core_HC_CC_Login_Profile_Filter
collectionProcessors.label: Core HC CC Login Profile Filter

value.stringValue: Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User
Core HC Customer Community Plus User
Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User

The system was unable to automatically create a portal user due to the ‘Email’ field on the clinician record being blank or the Email address is a duplicate to an existing, active portal user. The clinician cannot proceed through the recruiting process until this task is complete. Please navigate to the Clinician record and select “Enable Customer User” in the upper right to manually enable the Clinician’s to access the Care Connect portal to view Helpful Links and complete any ‘To Do' or open tasks.
Email Validation Failed – Manually Enable Customer User to Continue

rules.name: Source_ET_LOCUM_LEASED_OR_MANAGED

decisions.name: Does_user_with_same_email_exist_or_Clinician_Email_is_blank
decisions.label: Does user with same email exist or Clinician Email is blank?

Flow.description: PR1050558-811 : Creates Portal User for Applicant. PR1050558-3374 : Updates the Clinician's Profile from CC login to CC plus based on HPF being Active/Creates a user with CC plus if it doesnt exist. PR1050558-4200: Update Login Profile Name

formulas.name: emailTitle
formulas.expression: IF( OR( UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "NP", UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "PA", UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "RN", UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "LPN" ),{!frmFirstName}, IF( OR( UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "MD", UPPER(TRIM({!frmProfessionalTitle})) = "DO" ), "Dr."+' '+{!frmLastName}, "Other" ) )

Flow.label: Generic Process Sub Event Flow

value.stringValue: Update Clinician Information to unblock the Okta Integration

recordUpdates.name: Update_user_profile_to_CoreHC_CC_plus
recordUpdates.label: Update user profile to CoreHC CC plus

textTemplates.name: emailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!emailTitle},

Welcome to SCP Health!


﻿What to Expect

1. Activate Your SCP Account

• Look for an email from Okta to set up your account.

• Complete this step within 7 days to access the SCP portal.

• If you run into issues, please contact our help desk at 337.609.1411.


2. Download the mySCP Connect App

• Available on Google Play and Apple App Store

• Enter Organization: SCP

• Log in using your SCP credentials from Step 1


3. Complete Onboarding Requirements

• Available after account activation

• Compliance training will be accessible once your first shift is scheduled and must be completed before working.

textTemplates.name: PEComment
textTemplates.text: 1. Navigate to the Clinician’s record 2. Ensure the following fields are populated: 2a. Social Security Number 2b. Zipcode (Mailing Address) 2c. Mobile 3. Close Task with Status = ‘Completed’ to trigger the Okta Integration.

textTemplates.name: taskComment2
textTemplates.text: 1. Navigate to the Clinician’s record 2. Ensure the following fields are populated: 2a. Social Security Number 2b. Zipcode (Mailing Address) 2c. Mobile 3. Then select ‘Enable Customer User’ 4. Before you click ‘Save’: 4a. Profile = ‘Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User’ 4b. Complete all required fields (marked in red)
